findings.description: The page contains a prominent section heading '業務要件の洗い出し' and an introductory paragraph defining 業務要件 as '日々の仕事を行うために必要となる条件' with illustrative examples (回転寿司屋の業務要件). Neither the heading nor the paragraph is represented by any entity. Only the exam callout figure is captured (leaf_count=1).
A コラム box 'わからなくなったら絵に描いてみる' occupies the lower half of the page with explanatory text about diagram-based learning. Not represented in any entity.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: figure::p221::0 caption jp starts with '試験にはコレが出る！ - 要件定義プロセスとは、業務要件を明確にするプロセスである - 要件定義プロセスの主な目的は「ユーザーのニーズを知ること」' — the fix is present and the caption content is accurate vs the image callout. However, the release has only 1 entity for a page with substantial textual content (section heading, definition paragraph, and a コラム box), resulting in WARN due to medium-severity missing content.
